title: senecio ferruglii
intro: Senecio ferruglii, also known as Ferrugineous Groundsel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio ferruglii include its potential to help lower blood pressure and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
